THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, RICHARD A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1117A OCEAN, STAYED UNTIL FEB-27-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.

CASE NOT SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
